Acolyte.description: You're well trained in religious rites and doctrines
Acolyte.name: Acolyte

Amnesiac.description: Your past is a haze, but some memories return
Amnesiac.name: Amnesiac

Ascetic.description: People fear you, but seek out your guidance
Ascetic.name: Ascetic

Banished.description: Your people cast you out for supposed crimes
Banished.name: Banished

Barbarian.description: You left the horde, but it never quite left you
Barbarian.name: Barbarian

Blacksmith.description: Weapons, armor, horseshoes; you do it all
Blacksmith.name: Blacksmith

Bowyer.description: You can make and fix any bow or arrow
Bowyer.name: Bowyer

Chirurgeon.description: You know anatomy, surgery, and first aid
Chirurgeon.name: Chirurgeon

Chosen.description: An eldritch being selected you for a purpose
Chosen.name: Chosen

Crafter.description: You can make and fix any utilitarian item
Crafter.name: Crafter

Criminal.description: You were exiled from your village for a crime
Criminal.name: Criminal

Crop Farmer.description: You toil in the earth and know all plants
Crop Farmer.name: Crop Farmer

Demonborn.description: An ancestor of yours is a powerful demon
Demonborn.name: Demonborn

Displaced.description: You fled after a rival jarl attacked your village
Displaced.name: Displaced

Drawn.description: You hear a whispered call and follow it
Drawn.name: Drawn

Drifter.description: You have not yet found a jarl worthy of your loyalty
Drifter.name: Drifter

Enforcer.description: You enforce the jarl's law in your village
Enforcer.name: Enforcer

Fallen.description: You fell from grace. Will you atone, or embrace it?
Fallen.name: Fallen

Far Traveler.description: You know many distant people and customs
Far Traveler.name: Far Traveler

Feytouched.description: A fairy befriended you in your childhood
Feytouched.name: Feytouched

Fisher.description: You know all the sea creatures and legends
Fisher.name: Fisher

Forager.description: You know how to find the edible and the deadly
Forager.name: Forager

Freed.description: You were a thrall, but escaped or won your freedom
Freed.name: Freed

God's Blood.description: You are descended from a god; it marks you
God's Blood.name: God's Blood

Haunted.description: A restless spirit wants something from you
Haunted.name: Haunted

Healer.description: You understand how life and death intertwine
Healer.name: Healer

Hermit.description: The wilds (and its creatures) are your family
Hermit.name: Hermit

Heroborn.description: You are the descendant of a famous warrior
Heroborn.name: Heroborn

Hunter.description: You know how to move quietly in the wilds
Hunter.name: Hunter

Jeweler.description: You can easily appraise value and authenticity
Jeweler.name: Jeweler

Marked.description: You carry an eldritch mark. Is it a curse, or a gift?
Marked.name: Marked

Marooned.description: They left you behind, but you refused to die
Marooned.name: Marooned

Mercenary.description: You fought friend and foe alike for your coin
Mercenary.name: Mercenary

Minstrel.description: You've traveled far with your charm and talent
Minstrel.name: Minstrel

Noble.description: A famous name has opened many doors for you
Noble.name: Noble

Nobleborn.description: You are the child of a jarl.
Nobleborn.name: Nobleborn

Orphaned.description: An unusual guardian rescued and raised you
Orphaned.name: Orphaned

Outcast.description: You were thrown out for real or supposed crimes
Outcast.name: Outcast

Ranger.description: The woods and wilds are your true home
Ranger.name: Ranger

Redeemer.description: You must redeem the name of your kin
Redeemer.name: Redeemer

Sacrifice.description: You were to be ritually sacrificed, but escaped
Sacrifice.name: Sacrifice

Sailor.description: Pirate, privateer, or merchant — the seas are yours
Sailor.name: Sailor

Scholar.description: You know much about ancient history and lore
Scholar.name: Scholar

Scout.description: You survived on stealth, observation, and speed
Scout.name: Scout

Seer's Apprentice.description: You know some of the mystic arts
Seer's Apprentice.name: Seer's Apprentice

Shipwright.description: You know how to build and repair longboats
Shipwright.name: Shipwright

Skald.description: You are a poet and know all the ancient ballads
Skald.name: Skald

Soldier.description: You served as a fighter in an organized army
Soldier.name: Soldier

Trader.description: You have mercantile connections in every village
Trader.name: Trader

Urchin.description: You grew up in the merciless streets of a large city
Urchin.name: Urchin

Wanted.description: There's a price on your head, but you have allies
Wanted.name: Wanted

Witchborn.description: They burned your mother, but spared you
Witchborn.name: Witchborn

Wizard's Apprentice.description: You have a knack and eye for magic
Wizard's Apprentice.name: Wizard's Apprentice

Wolfchild.description: Long ago, you walked into town wearing pelts
Wolfchild.name: Wolfchild

Woodborn.description: They found you in the hollow of an oak tree
Woodborn.name: Woodborn
